name: Herbed Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: White wine vinegar or fresh lemon juice (2 Tbsp)
Fresh tarragon, minced or dried, crumbled (1 1/2 tbsp)
Fresh chervil, minced or dried, crumbled (1 1/2 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the vinegar, mustard, and salt and pepper to taste.
2. Slowly add the olive oil in a stream while whisking continuously.
3. Whisk until the vinaigrette is emulsified.
4. Stir in the chopped parsley, chives, tarragon (minced or crumbled dried), and chervil (minced or crumbled dried).
5. Makes about 2/3 cup. gourmet 7/88
